# James Kahoro — Software Engineer & Designer

> Full-stack developer & UI engineer crafting scalable, accessible, pixel-precise digital products for brands and founders. Based in Nairobi, Kenya. Available for remote & global freelance work.

## About

James Kahoro is a senior full-stack developer and UI designer with 5+ years of professional experience building web applications and digital products. He partners with founders, startups, and agencies to ship products that are fast, scalable, and visually compelling.

Key facts:
- 5+ years professional experience (2019–present)
- 30+ projects delivered
- 17 technologies mastered
- 100% client satisfaction rate
- Based in Nairobi, Kenya
- Available for remote & global freelance projects

## Services

### Full-Stack Development
Responsive, accessible web apps built with React, Next.js, and Node.js — fast and engaging on every device. Full ownership from architecture through deployment — APIs, databases, UIs, and CI/CD pipelines.

### UI / UX Design
User-focused interfaces shaped by real research. Wireframes to high-fidelity Figma prototypes, design systems, and motion design with Framer Motion.

### Branding & Digital Identity
Cohesive brand identities — personality, voice, and visual language that make products memorable and consistent across every touchpoint.

## Technology Stack

**Frontend:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES2022+), TypeScript, React.js, Next.js 14 (App Router), Redux, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Node.js, Express.js
**Databases:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase
**DevOps & Tools:** Docker, Git, CI/CD, Vercel
**Design:** Figma, component systems, design tokens, Three.js / Cobe (3D)

## Featured Projects

### Divine Travel Nest Safaris (2024)
Full-stack travel & safari booking platform for a Kenya-based safari company. Responsive, performance-optimized. Tags: Development, Design.
URL: https://divinetravelnestsafaris.com/

### 247 Cybercafé (2022)
Modern business web presence for a cybercafé. Custom design, responsive layout. Tags: Development, Design.
URL: https://247cybercafepro.netlify.app/

### Vicbon Interiors (2020)
Portfolio & showcase site for an interior design firm. Visual-first, responsive grid, smooth animations. Tags: Development, Design.
URL: https://vicboninteriors.netlify.app/

### Endless Plains Safaris (2021)
Safari travel discovery platform for East Africa with booking inquiry flow. Tags: Development, Design.
URL: https://endlessplainsafaris.netlify.app/

## Work Experience

**Senior Full-Stack Developer — Freelance / Remote** (2022–Present)
Designing and shipping complete web products for clients across East Africa and globally. Full ownership from architecture to deployment — APIs, databases, UIs, and brand identity.
Notable: Divine Travel Nest Safaris, SaaS platforms, remote-first workflow.

**Frontend Developer — Agencies & Startups** (2020–2022)
Built responsive frontends and complete client implementations for business websites, interior design portfolios, and hospitality platforms.
Notable: Vicbon Interiors (2020), Endless Plains Safaris (2021), 247 Cybercafé (2022).

**Self-Taught Web Developer — Personal Projects & Open Source** (2019–2020)
Immersed in web fundamentals — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Built personal projects, contributed to open source, and landed first freelance contracts.

## Working Process

1. **Discovery** — Deep-dive into goals, users, and constraints before any code is written
2. **Design** — Wireframes evolve into high-fidelity Figma prototypes with aligned visual direction
3. **Build** — Iterative, tested, transparent development with working increments at each stage
4. **Review & QA** — Cross-device testing, performance profiling, accessibility audits
5. **Launch** — CI/CD deployment, analytics setup, DNS configuration, post-launch support included

## Testimonials

"James has an exceptional ability to translate ideas into clean, performant interfaces. Every delivery was ahead of schedule and beyond expectation." — Vritika N., Regional Head @ GirlScript

"His design proficiency is remarkable — consistently top-notch work that elevates the user experience. A genuine asset on any product team." — Amrit Raj, Senior Developer @ Ignite

"Strong technical skills paired with a collaborative attitude. James played a pivotal role in building the application from the ground up." — Divya Walia, Senior Developer @ Nagarro

"Beyond his technical prowess, what sets James apart is his keen eye and the questions he asks that elevate the entire team's output." — Elavarasan M., Technical Lead @ Ignite
